ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Continued To Feb-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lisa Quan appeared in person for and with Hiroko Goto (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the lost will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated July 13, 1999 is admitted to probate. Hiroko Goto is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Barrett: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Continued To Nov-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Continued To Aug-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
